posts.author: michael.m (Michael)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to send a monday doc completed on one board to another board? I just want to be able to access the information in another board. It does not transfer to another files column and if I click on the item the files gallery does not show the Monday doc. Any suggestions on how I can create a document that can “travel” with an item from one board to another?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @michael.m!

At this stage in order to achieve this you would need to create a doc outside the board, which you can then add across multiple different boards. I recognise this isn’t the ideal option, so would recommend submitting this as a feature request so it gets greater visibility and votes

posts.author: Suzette (Suzette Welling)
posts.cookedHtml: Any movement on this issue? It would be very helpful to be able to do this.
